name: Stonesense

sources.name: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

sources.name: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

link.name: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 79
link.alt: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 79

text: You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense to a range of 100 feet, but you can only sense vibrations through natural stone (not masonry, adobe, or any other manufactured edifice).
